description: I build rich, real-time dashboards in Grafana to visualize system metrics, track performance trends, and catch anomalies before they become incidents.
My metrics collection backbone — I configure Prometheus scrapers, alerting rules, and exporters to monitor every layer of my infrastructure.
Sentry is my first line of defense for error tracking — I integrate it across frontend and backend to catch, trace, and resolve bugs in real time.
I use the ELK Stack to aggregate, parse, and search through massive log volumes — turning raw log data into actionable operational insights.
I set up UptimeRobot monitors across all my deployments to get instant alerts on downtime and maintain high availability SLAs for clients.
I wire up Google Analytics across web apps to track user journeys, conversion funnels, and traffic sources — turning behavior data into product decisions.
Beyond DNS and security, I leverage Cloudflare's analytics and bot management tools to monitor traffic patterns and protect apps from malicious activity.
